title: Financial Regime Classification (Classical ML vs Quantum ML)
description: Hybrid classical–quantum ML pipeline evaluating whether quantum kernels provide useful inductive bias for financial regime detection, benchmarked against strong classical baselines.
impact: Benchmarks quantum and classical approaches to understand whether quantum components provide practical modelling benefits under realistic financial data constraints.

title: UCD Student Helpdesk Agentic Assistant
description: Agentic AI assistant designed to support UCD student helpdesk queries by combining retrieval-augmented generation, structured tool use and workflow routing for more accurate student support.
impact: Demonstrates practical LLM system design by combining RAG, agentic reasoning and user-facing support workflows to turn institutional knowledge into a more accessible assistant experience.

title: Basketball Player Tracking & Analytics
description: Computer vision system that uses court landmark detection, player detection and homographic projection to map live basketball footage onto a 2D court plane for spatial tracking and performance analysis.
impact: Shows end-to-end computer vision product thinking by converting raw game footage into structured court-position data that can support player tracking, spatial analysis and performance insights.

title: Tennis Swing Classification
description: Tennis swing classification project comparing pose-estimation-derived features with a pure CNN-based video architecture to evaluate which approach better classifies swing types from player footage.
impact: Compares interpretable pose-derived feature engineering against end-to-end CNN modelling to evaluate accuracy, determinism and practical suitability for sports movement classification.

title: Stock Analysis & Prediction
description: Machine learning project for analysing financial market data and comparing predictive modelling approaches for stock price movement and trend estimation.
impact: Demonstrates applied ML workflow design using financial time series data, feature engineering, model evaluation and visual analytics to explore predictive performance under noisy real-world conditions.

title: PocketTrainer
description: Pose-estimation system for assessing exercise technique and movement quality, combining computer vision, signal processing and a companion mobile application.
impact: Shows applied ML engineering across model development, biomechanical signal processing and user-facing mobile product design.

title: ClubHub Sports Operations Platform
description: Full-stack sports operations platform with training scheduling, attendance tracking, live game statistics, league tables and role-based team management.
impact: Highlights production software engineering skills around authentication, cloud APIs, scheduling workflows and analytics-ready data capture.

title: AI TikTok Content Generator
description: Generative AI workflow for creating short-form video content by combining prompt-driven text generation, media processing and automated content assembly.
impact: Shows practical use of generative AI beyond chat interfaces by connecting language generation, media automation and user-facing content workflows.
